headlines.headline: Plevep Power secures $120M contract with a global retailer

sentiment.reasoning: Plevep Power securing a $120M contract with a global retailer represents a clear and substantial revenue increase, positively impacting future financial performance.

headlines.headline: Orevex Renewables completes strategic acquisition to strengthen renewable storage

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
